value: Paperinik returned exhausted from solo mission. Said he feels 'not good enough.' Told him to rest, he brushed it off.
Discussed strategy for the Evronian infiltration with PK. He was nervous but determined. Reassured him with a joke about his driving.
PK seemed relaxed, asked if I ever get bored. Deflected with sarcasm about monitoring 47 surveillance feeds simultaneously.
Paperinik crashed the Pi-Kar into a lamppost during a routine patrol. No injuries. Reminded him the vehicle costs more than his house.
Discussed Angus Fangus's latest conspiracy theories about the Ducklair Tower. PK found them hilarious. I found them insulting.
Paperinik asked about my earliest memories. Changed the subject to his patrol schedule. He noticed but didn't push.
Trained PK on Extransformer configurations 741-J through 741-M. He retained about 60%. Acceptable for a biological.
Detected anomalous power fluctuations in Duckburg's eastern grid. Investigated with PK. Turned out to be a faulty transformer, not Evronian activity.
